languages.text: В линзах неподвижной боевой машины Адептус Астартес отражается зеленый свет. Периодически из вокс-динамиков раздается тихое шипение, похожее на звук слабого затрудненного дыхания.

traits.locale_text: Ксенос пронзительно шипит, с остервенением пытаясь сломать свою призрачную клетку.

languages.text: Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.
languages.original_text: В линзах неподвижной боевой машины Адептус Астартес отражается зеленый свет. Периодически из вокс-динамиков раздается тихое шипение, похожее на звук слабого затрудненного дыхания.

traits.locale_text: Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.
Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.
Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.

languages.text: 绿光映照在那台静止不动的阿斯塔特修会战争机器的镜片上。音阵扬声器里不时传出一声低哑的嘶响，像是微弱而艰难的呼吸声。
languages.original_text: Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.

traits.locale_text: 绿光映照在那台静止不动的阿斯塔特修会战争机器的镜片上。音阵扬声器里不时传出一声低哑的嘶响，像是微弱而艰难的呼吸声。

languages.text: La luz verde se refleja en las lentes de la inmóvil máquina de guerra del Adeptus Astartes. De vez en cuando se oye un tenue soplo a través de los altavoces de voco, una especie de respiración débil y trabajosa.
languages.original_text: Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.

traits.locale_text: La luz verde se refleja en las lentes de la inmóvil máquina de guerra del Adeptus Astartes. De vez en cuando se oye un tenue soplo a través de los altavoces de voco, una especie de respiración débil y trabajosa.

languages.text: Une lueur verte se reflète dans les lentilles de la machine de guerre immobile de l'Adeptus Astartes. Ponctuellement, un sifflement discret rappelant une respiration faible et difficile émane des haut-parleurs.
languages.original_text: Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.

traits.locale_text: Une lueur verte se reflète dans les lentilles de la machine de guerre immobile de l'Adeptus Astartes. Ponctuellement, un sifflement discret rappelant une respiration faible et difficile émane des haut-parleurs.

languages.text: Grünes Licht spiegelt sich in den Linsen der bewegungslosen Kriegsmaschine des Adeptus Astartes. Ab und an ertönt aus den Vox-Lautsprechern ein leises Zischen, das wie schwaches, angestrengtes Atmen klingt.
languages.original_text: Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.

traits.locale_text: Grünes Licht spiegelt sich in den Linsen der bewegungslosen Kriegsmaschine des Adeptus Astartes. Ab und an ertönt aus den Vox-Lautsprechern ein leises Zischen, das wie schwaches, angestrengtes Atmen klingt.

languages.text: Hareketsiz Adeptus Astartes savaş makinesinin lenslerinde yeşil bir ışık yansıyor. Arada bir voks hoparlörlerinden zayıf, zoraki bir nefes alma sesine benzeyen sessiz bir tıslama geliyor.
languages.original_text: Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.

traits.locale_text: Hareketsiz Adeptus Astartes savaş makinesinin lenslerinde yeşil bir ışık yansıyor. Arada bir voks hoparlörlerinden zayıf, zoraki bir nefes alma sesine benzeyen sessiz bir tıslama geliyor.

languages.text: 緑色の光が、動かないアデープタス・アスターテスの戦車に映り込む。時々、弱々しく苦しそうに息を吸うような静かなヒス音が、ヴォックス・スピーカーから聞こえる。
languages.original_text: Green light is reflected in the lenses of the unmoving Adeptus Astartes war machine. Every now and then, a quiet hiss like the sound of weak, laboured breathing, comes from the vox-speakers.

traits.locale_text: 緑色の光が、動かないアデープタス・アスターテスの戦車に映り込む。時々、弱々しく苦しそうに息を吸うような静かなヒス音が、ヴォックス・スピーカーから聞こえる。
